heading: Stolen cultural property
label: 2607 Stolen cultural property
text: No article of cultural property documented as appertaining to the inventory of a museum or religious or secular public monument or similar institution in any State Party which is stolen from such institution after the effective date of this chapter, or after the date of entry into force of the Convention for the State Party, whichever date is later, may be imported into the United States.
notes: References in TextFor the effective date of this chapter, referred to in text, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 315 of Pub. L. 97–446section 2601 of this title

Effective DateSection effective on the 90th day after , or on any date which the President shall prescribe and publish in the Federal Register, with exceptions, see , set out as a note under .Jan. 12, 1983section 315 of Pub. L. 97–446section 2601 of this title
